findings.location: s2 — 更新画面初期表示までの実装 (Java code example)
findings.description: The `getWindowScopeObject` private helper method definition is present in the source code example but omitted from the knowledge file. The source includes the method signature `private W11AC03Form getWindowScopeObject(SqlResultSet sysAcct, SqlResultSet users, SqlResultSet permissionUnit, SqlResultSet ugroup)` and the inline comment `// 【説明】検索結果を設定したFormを返すメソッド`. The knowledge file's code ends after the closing brace of `doRW11AC0301` without including this method.
findings.source_evidence: Source lines beginning with `private W11AC03Form getWindowScopeObject(...)` under the W11AC03Action.java code block.
